meta.title: Nala Pustaka: Javanese Ancient Manuscript Digitization & AI Analysis Platform
meta.description: Leading digital platform to preserve, analyze, and access ancient Javanese manuscripts using AI, RAG, and Knowledge Graph technology.

hero.title: Explore the Archipelago's
hero.description: Advanced digital platform combining traditional philology with artificial intelligence to preserve, analyze, and open access to thousands of ancient Indonesian manuscripts.

academic.title: Academic & Technological Approach
academic.subtitle: We combine rigorous academic standards with cutting-edge technology to provide an immersive research experience.

rag.title: RAG Chatbot
rag.description: Chat with manuscripts using Retrieval-Augmented Generation providing accurate answers based on original manuscript context.

graph.title: Knowledge Graph
graph.description: Visualize relationships between characters, places, and events in manuscripts to understand narrative structure comprehensively.

catalog.title: Indexed Catalog
catalog.description: Semantic search allowing you to find manuscripts based on meaning and context, not just keywords.

quote.text: A great nation is a nation that respects its history and culture.
quote.author: Ir. Soekarno
